name: Toffee Chip Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream the butter until smooth.
Add brown sugar and vanilla, mixing well.
2. Gradually add flour and baking powder, stirring until all ingredients are
well combined.
3. Press the dough evenly into an ungreased 9 x 13 inch baking pan. Flatten
the surface.
4. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let
cool slightly.
5. Cut the cooled squares into triangles or 2-inch pieces.
6. Prepare the topping by melting chocolate chips, butter, and water in a
double boiler over hot water. Stir until smooth.
7. Remove the top of the double boiler from the heat. Let the mixture set for
a moment before dropping a large dollop into the center of each square or
triangle.
8. Sprinkle Bits 'o Brickle chips generously over the wet chocolate.
9. Refrigerate to allow the topping to set completely. Remove the squares
with a spatula and shake off any excess Bits 'o Brickle.
End of Recipe
